questions.question: Describe the difference between a two-dimensional array and a matrix. Provide an example of each to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Be sure to include a clear explanation and examples

questions.question: Write a C++ program to initialize a 2D array of size 3x4 and assign values to it. Then, print the values in the array.
questions.hint: Use a standard output method such as cout

questions.question: Explain the concept of row-major and column-major storage in 2D arrays. Provide an example to demonstrate the difference.
questions.hint: Focus on the storage organization of the array elements
